message:
feat: local PNG + SVG export via puppeteer

Add local image export using headless Chrome (puppeteer) with the same
ExcalidrawLib.exportToSvg() pipeline as the Excalidraw web app.

- New `src/png.ts`: buildRenderHTML(), buildSvgHTML(), renderPngLocal(), renderSvgLocal()
- PNG: exportToSvg → canvas at 2x → toDataURL("image/png")
- SVG: exportToSvg → XMLSerializer.serializeToString()
- Pin CDN to @excalidraw/excalidraw@0.17.6 (0.18.0 moved UMD path)
- Chrome flags --disable-web-security to bypass ORB for CDN scripts
- Add `puppeteer` as optionalDependency (no forced Chrome download)
- Extend OutputFormat with "png" | "svg", add pngBase64/svgString to RenderResult
- MCP tool returns image content block for PNG format
- Worker refactored to import shared buildRenderHTML() from src/png.ts
- Tests: 8 new tests validating PNG magic bytes, IHDR dimensions, SVG markup
